steps.title: Identify the strongest evidence
steps.content: Reviewers praised One Last Word as “a beautiful and powerful tribute to the poets who inspired it.” Since Grimes's stated goal was to honor important Black poets, this praise directly demonstrates she achieved her goal.

steps.title: Connect the evidence to the answer
steps.content: Choice B correctly captures what the evidence indicates: Grimes successfully used the method to achieve her goal. The other choices either contradict what the passage shows, overstate the information given, or introduce unsupported claims. This matches choice B — B is correct.
